3 TO 4 SMALL TREES DOWN. SIDING DAMAGE TO SMALL BUSINESS. PEA SIZE HAIL AND HEAVY RAIN.

SEVERAL T-HANGERS AT THE PICKAWAY COUNTY AIRPORT RECEIVED DAMAGE. ONE HANGER HAD PART OF THE ROOF REMOVED. THE DOORS ON THE SECOND HANGER WHERE MOVED OFF THE UPPER TRACK. A THIRD HANGER HAD THE DOORS BLOWN UPWARDS AND OFF THE LOWER TRACK. AN AIRPLANE INSIDE THE HANGER SUFFERED DAMAGE TO THE NOSE COWLING, COOLERS AND CARBURETORS AND POSSIBLE PROP DAMAGE. A TAXIWAY LIGHT WAS ALSO DAMAGED.
